title: clematis lanuginosa
intro: Clematis lanuginosa, also known as the downy clematis or woolly clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Clematis lanuginosa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Clematis lanuginosa are typically made from the plant's roots and stems, and can be administered orally or applied topically as a tincture, decoction, or salve.
